default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise Software, Cloud, and AI
default.description: Te hamani nei e te horo'a nei te Horizon Tech i te mau faanahoraa roro uira, te mau rave'a AI, te mau faanahoraa cloud e te mau tauihaa roro uira na te mau pŭpŭ hiaai.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Te mau faanahoraa aravihi o te faito rahi
home.description: Te mau faanahoraa no te taiete, te AI/ML, te faanahoraa cloud, e te horo'araa IoT na te mau pŭpŭ na te ao nei.

about.title: No ni'a i te Horizon Tech | Misioni e pŭpŭ a te taiete
about.description: A haapii mai no ni'a i te Horizon Tech, ta tatou misioni, e nahea tatou i te horo'a i te mau rave'a apî maitai roa.

team.title: Pŭpŭ | Te feia faatere e te feia aravihi no Horizon Tech
team.description: A farerei i te mau aivanaa e te feia faatere e hamani nei i te mau faanahoraa roro uira e te mau faanahoraa cloud i Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Toro'a | A patu e te Horizon Tech
careers.description: A hi'opo'a i te mau ti'araa e a faarahi i to outou toro'a i roto i te pŭpŭ aravihi a Horizon Tech.

contact.title: A farerei atu i te Horizon Tech | A haamata i ta outou opuaraa
contact.description: A farerei i te Horizon Tech no te aparau no ni'a i ta outou opuaraa, te mau hinaaro i te pae no te matini, e te taime haponoraa.

caseStudies.title: Te mau hi'opo'araa i te mau hi'oraa | Te mau faahopearaa o te Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: A tai'o i te mau tuatapaparaa e te mau hopearaa tei horo'ahia mai e Horizon Tech i roto i te mau taiete atoa.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Te mau hi'oraa i te pae no te mau matini, te mau haapiiraa no te horo'araa, e te arata'iraa no ni'a i te hamaniraa fare no roto mai i te Horizon Tech.

education.title: Haapiiraa | Te mau rave'a tauturu no te haapiiraa a Horizon Tech
education.description: Te mau arata'iraa, te mau faahororaa, e te mau rave'a haapiiraa no roto mai i te Horizon Tech.

support.title: Tauturu | Horizon Tech
support.description: A farii i te mau rave'a tauturu e te mau rave'a no te farerei i te mau faanahoraa Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Ture no te oraraa o te taata iho | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: A tai'o i te ture no te paruru i te mau haamaramaramaraa a Horizon Tech.

terms.title: Te mau ture no te taviniraa | Horizon Tech
terms.description: A tai'o i te mau ture no te taviniraa a Horizon Tech no ta matou tahua itenati e ta matou mau ohipa.

profile.title: Hoho'a | Horizon Tech
profile.description: A faatere i ta outou hoho'a Horizon Tech, te mau faanahoraa, e te mau haamaramaramaraa no ni'a i te aamu.

firstTimeSetup.title: Faanahoraa matamua | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: A faaî i te faanahoraa matamua no te tamau noa i roto i te Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Ua mo'ehia te parau huna | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: A faaapî faahou i te tomoraa i roto i ta outou tomoraa Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Faaho'i faahou i te parau huna | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: A hamani i te hoê parau huna apî no ta outou tomoraa Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Haapapû i te rata uira | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: A haapapû i ta outou rata uira no te faaohipa i ta outou tomoraa Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Te pŭpŭ faatere | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Administration workspace for Horizon Tech platform management.

unauthorized.title: Aita i faati'ahia | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Aita ta outou e nehenehe e hi'o i teie api Horizon Tech.

services.title: Te mau ohipa | Horizon Tech
services.description: A hi'opo'a i te mau faanahoraa a Horizon Tech i roto i te faanahoraa roro uira, te AI, te cloud, te DevOps, e te tauiraa roro uira.

innovationLab.title: Piha no te mau ohipa apî | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: A hi'o Horizon Tech experiments and prototypes in AI and applied engineering.

authCallback.title: Te tomoraa i roto | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Te faaîraa i te tomoraa papû no ta outou tomoraa Horizon Tech.
